title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Synergy Property Development

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Synergy Property Development
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
